code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut sum = 0
mut state = 0
mut tok_start = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut b = 10
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 10
    end
  end

  let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
  let is_newline = b == 10

  if state == 0
    if not is_space and not is_newline
      state = 1
    end
  else if state == 1
    if is_newline
      state = 0
    else if is_space
      state = 2
    end
  else if state == 2
    if is_newline
      state = 0
    else if not is_space
      state = 3
      tok_start = i
    end
  else if state == 3
    if is_space or is_newline
      let s = string.substring(text, tok_start, i)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(v)
        sum = sum + v
      when None
        ()
      end
      if is_newline
        state = 0
      else
        state = 4
      end
    end
  else
    if is_newline
      state = 0
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("sum=#{sum}")
